name: Fresh Head & Trotter Soup
shortDesc: Slow-simmered daily with fresh beef head meat and marrow bone broth — a deeply memorable traditional soup
metaDesc: Çorbacı fresh head and trotter soup. Prepared daily with beef head and marrow bone broth, additive-free traditional flavour.
keywords: head and trotter soup, kelle paca, traditional head soup, corbaci soup
longDesc: Beef head is carefully cleaned and trimmed, then simmered for hours with marrow bone broth over a gentle flame
Onion, garlic, bay leaf and black pepper give the soup its traditional aroma and depth
Made only from meat, bone broth and natural spices — no additives or preservatives
Serve hot with garlic and vinegar to enhance the flavour even further
High in protein and collagen — a nourishing, satisfying and strengthening meal
